title: The Secret City
author: Chuck Kelly
description: On his first day at the Learning Center on the enchanted planet Otherland (which is not far from planet Earth) thirteen-year-old Bunker Charles' personal flying zoomer is borrowed by a student named CJ, who takes off and flies to the mountains. Bunker and his friend, Gittel, follow him. After a few misadventures along the way they come across the mysterious Secret City that is hidden among snow-capped mountains. Bunker and Gittel meet Victor, a tall silver man who shows them around the Secret Ci
